Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm - Nơi nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng tại Vũng Tàu

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm là một khách sạn 5.0 sao nằm tại Vũng Tàu, Việt Nam. Với khoảng cách chỉ 50 km từ trung tâm thành phố, đây là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trốn khỏi cuộc sống đô thị ồn ào và tận hưởng không gian yên bình bên bờ biển.

Với tổng cộng 502 phòng, Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm có đủ không gian để đón tiếp khách du lịch từ khắp nơi trên thế giới. Khách sạn được xây dựng vào năm 2021, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm hiện đại và sang trọng.

Đặc biệt, chính sách của khách sạn cho phép trẻ em từ 4 đến 11 tuổi nghỉ miễn phí. Điều này tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ cùng nhau mà không lo về chi phí. Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho mọi du khách muốn tìm kiếm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Vũng Tàu.

sample_comments.text:
- Phòng rãi, sạch sẽ, sáng sủa, gọn gàng
- View biển và nhìn xuống hồ bơi, rất thoáng và đẹp
- Nội khu nhiều cây xanh mát mẻ
- Buffet đầy đủ món Á-Âu-Mỹ, cơ bản, chưa đa dạng, nhưng nêm nếm ngon
- Nhân viên siêu nhiệt tình, siêu dễ thương
- Check-in, check-out, gửi-nhận hành lý rất nhanh
- Có cả Playground ngoài trời và trong nhà ngay trong khuôn viên resort (100k/h/bé cho khu vực trong nhà)
- Gần đó có Wonder museum phù hợp với trẻ nhỏ
- Nhiều hoạt động khác như live music, ảo thuật, workshop,...

sample_comments.text: This 5-star resort is a perfect place for relaxation. The atmosphere is cool, peaceful, and surrounded by beautiful nature. The rooms are spacious, clean, and very comfortable with view beaches great for see sighting.The staff are friendly and professional, always ready to help. It's an ideal destination for anyone who wants to rest, recharge, and enjoy a quiet vacation away from the busy city. Highly recommended for a relaxing getaway.

sample_comments.text:
I've stayed at Holiday Inn Resort Ho Tram Beach several times, and every return visit still brings back the same sense of satisfaction as the very first.

What I love most about this resort is its open, clean, and well-maintained environment. It's an ideal destination for both family vacations and relaxing weekend getaways. The swimming pool is spacious, the grounds are lush and green, and the private beach is especially მშვიდ and quiet --- perfect for escaping the busy city life.

However, what impresses me the most is the service style of the staff, particularly the Front Office (FO) team. They are consistently professional, friendly, and incredibly attentive. From check-in to check-out, everything is handled smoothly, efficiently, and always accompanied by warm, genuine smiles. Even small requests are addressed quickly and flexibly, making guests feel truly cared for rather than just being served in a routine way.

To me, a beautiful resort alone is not enough --- it's the quality of service that keeps guests coming back. And Holiday Inn Ho Tram truly excels in this aspect. I will definitely return again on future occasions.

sample_comments.title: Hơi thất vọng !
sample_comments.text: Mình đi HI rất nhìu lần, và lần này cảm giác khá khó chịu. Khi check out, có 3 bạn staff để check out, có 3 dãy hàng để check out, 2 ông khách Hàn đang đứng dãy 2, 1 ông đang làm thủ tục, 1 ông đứng sau đợi, bạn NV dãy 3 đang làm cho 1 khách, mình đứng sau ông này (dãy 3), cái mắc cười là ông bên mình check out nhanh hơn ông bên dãy 2, ông khách đứng sau ông dãy 2 nhảy cái bụp qua giành check out trước với mình bên dãy 3, mình khá khó chịu vì mình là phụ nữ, có 2 con nhỏ đang đứng đợi chung, ông ta nhảy bổ qua với lý do ông ta ra trước mình, mình ko chấp nhận, mình bảo dù ra trước nhưng khác dãy thì cũng là chen hàng, nếu muốn check trước thì ít nhất lịch sự phải xin phép coi người ta đồng ý ko, đàn ông mà đi giành với phụ nữ, mình rất ko ưa khách du lịch Hàn, cứ cho mình cái quyền thượng đẳng, qua nước người ta mà ko tôn trọng người khác, nhất là phụ nữ. Mình đã mắng cho ông ta và ông ta phải xin lỗi. Cái thất vọng là khi mình lên nói bạn nhân viên check out, thì bạn ấy lại bênh ông ta. Là sao ? Là xếp hàng dãy khác, miễn ra trước, dãy kia check out nhanh hơn là có quyền nhảy hàng, chen trước à ??? Vậy chia dãy làm gì ? Trước đó cũng có 1 cô lớn tuổi chen lên, nhưng vì là người lớn tuổi, phụ nữ nên mình nhường, nhưng ko phải thấy thế mà cho rằng mình dễ tính. Mình thất vọng là chỗ này, hỏng lẽ cứ người nước ngoài là người VN cứ phải chịu thiệt thòi hơn à ? Mình đi rất nhìu resort và khi thấy chỗ nào có tư tưởng này mình sẽ luôn feedback rõ ràng để quản lý dạy lại tư tưởng cho các bạn nhân viên. Khách hàng đều giống nhau, ai cũng bỏ tiền giống nhau, nên sự tôn trọng là như nhau, nếu lần sau bạn nhân viên ấy còn thể hiện thái độ đó, mình sẽ ko hiền như lần này.

sample_comments.title: Many incidents with the room
sample_comments.text:
Overall, the resort is huge and full of entertainment. However, my experience with the room was a downfall. At first, the drain is stuck with just a bit of water (though it was fixed in 5 minutes after I called). But the real problem is the bathroom door, it stuck the moment I slide it in and my big daughter and I got stuck inside for 40 minutes, leaving my 5 years old daughter outside alone. It was frightening for her, didn't know what to do with the situation. Luckily, my sister's family who stayed on another floor couldn't contact us and then asked for help. 
Though the staff offers us a room upgrade but it was quite late and was dinner time so we turned down the offer and spent the rest of our time there, never trying to close that bathroom door again.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
The room was amazing --- stylish, clean, and super relaxing. I loved the color of the room; it made everything feel luxurious and fresh. The bathroom was also a highlight, with a really smart layout where the sink, toilet, and shower were separate but well-designed.

The water pressure in the shower could be stronger, but overall everything was great. The provided toiletries smelled wonderful and unique.

The staff were extremely friendly and tried their best to make everything perfect. The hallways were quiet and clean, which added to the overall calm atmosphere.

I really enjoyed my stay and would definitely return!
sample_comments.negatives:
What I didn't love was the lack of dining options --- there was only one main restaurant and the food was just okay. Also, there weren't many souvenir shops or small stores around the resort, which was a bit disappointing for a resort stay.

Still, the comfort of the room and friendliness of the staff made it a very enjoyable experience overall. I'd stay again, but with adjusted expectations for dining and shopping options.

About the latter, after a few years into operation, the resort is still new compared with its neighboring Grand Ho Tram. However, things are not "as good as new", which I think potential vacation seekers should take into account.

A group of tourist can schedule for an after 12 pm trip to Vung Tau City and explore the city's highlights especially the Christ the Redeemer statue. A 2 day stay for tourists is good enough at the resort.

sample_comments.title: The location is disappointing, but it is offset by the rest.
sample_comments.text: I think it would be good to go with the intention of not leaving the resort. It's further from Ho Chi Minh City than expected, so the journey to the resort right after entering the country was a bit tiring, but the friendly reception, sea view, and spacious pool were satisfying. Originally, I had planned to explore the city of Vung Tau a bit, but since it was farther than expected, I ended up just playing at the resort. The prices within the resort are a bit high, so it might be good to bring some snacks and other food. We didn't know and arrived without anything, but the Lemongrass restaurant in the resort had various menus, and we enjoyed our lunch and dinner there, and there are also a few options at other restaurants. We spent four days swimming, walking, and had a good time. I'm not sure if it's because it's newly built or well-maintained, but the water is clean. The filter we used for four days is still fine.^^

sample_comments.title: November 16th - 3 nights, male in his 50s.
sample_comments.text:
Travel time: It takes about 2 and a half hours from Ho Chi Minh City to arrive. It may vary depending on the traffic, but that's generally the case.

Room: Since I usually stay at budget accommodations, this room feels spacious and clean, with a soothing green tone that's nice, unlike the pictures. I booked it cheaply on Agoda, and it's on the top floor, the 21st. It's not an ocean view, but you can see the sea. The bath towels are large, and there's a full-body mirror, amenities, and free coffee, tea, and water, so no complaints.

Staff: Check-in is at 4 PM, but I was able to check in two hours early. To use the elevator, you need to hold the room key and then press the floor button. The receptionist was considerate of my limited English and came with me to the elevator to help me. They have great hospitality.

Breakfast: The variety is decent, but don't expect too much. It's not particularly delicious. Maybe a bit luxurious.

Pool: It's comfortably normal. The sea has a private beach, which is nice. There weren't many people swimming, but I was able to swim in the pool even in this season. It was just a bit windy.

Casino: This is the main purpose of my trip. The casino with dealers has baccarat with a minimum bet of mostly $100, and there might have been slightly lower rates during the day. Blackjack has a minimum of $10 or $25, and the young female dealer was quite strong, resulting in several losses for me. The big/small games start at $5, but most people don't play. I think roulette starts around $5. For electronic games, roulette starts from 50 cents, baccarat from $10, and there is no blackjack. The impression is that there are many old slot machines. There are none from the Buffalo series.

Regarding free stays, I was initially informed that you could earn 1 point for a $30 table bet, and a $5 slot bet, so I had given up on the free stay. However, I earn roughly 250 points a day just playing electronic baccarat, easily making it possible to stay for free. However, if payment has already been made via Agoda or similar, it cannot be done. Since I am checking out on Sunday, if I clear 188 points by check-out, I can stay for free. The accumulated points over three days are valid, so I plan to stay for free. It may change depending on the season, so I recommend confirming by email in advance or asking at the casino without being shy. There are staff members who can speak a little Japanese. Just a little.

Drinks are free. I don't know about alcohol. When I made the membership card for the first time, I was able to eat a buffet once. They also gave me a hat. ´-
This turned out to be a long text, but I hope it can be of some help to you.

sample_comments.title: Great place to stay with young kids
sample_comments.text:
I've been here with my 2 year old daughter and she loved it here. The room is nice, checkin/checkout were fast and easy. We had King suite and it has a great view of the sea. The staff at the restaurant were very friendly and supportive to me and my kid. 
The minus thing is this hotel is so far from the lobby, and I always had to carry my daughter all the way to the main gate at the lobby to take my car to go any where. 
The staff is helpful but when we checked in, there was so much information and I had to keep pressing 0 to ask. 
The hotel provides turndown service, but surprisingly the staff did not close all the curtains, and each time they did a bit differently. 
Overall, I enjoyed the stay and will be coming for another time

sample_comments.text: The hotel is beautiful, clean, and the breakfast is very delicious, though there aren't too many dishes; however, the quality is much better than having many dishes that are not tasty. The cooked dishes are quite good. There are many amenities in the hotel complex, such as a cinema, game center, eateries, and a large and beautiful swimming pool; in the afternoon, sitting to enjoy the sea breeze is very refreshing. The hotel has 3 covered pickleball courts that are cool, and the rental prices for the courts and equipment are reasonable. My children really enjoy it; the kids' club is nice but only suitable for younger children, and in front of the kids' club, there is a beautifully painted wall! A downside is that the sound insulation of the hotel is not very good; in the outside rooms, it's fine, but whenever I go to the toilet area, I can often hear the conversations of guests on the upper floors or nearby.

Điều này gây ra một chút cảm giác hụt hẫng. Hồ Tràm ngày mồng 3 và 4 Tết ban ngày trời nắng gắt ... không có ô khiến nắng ở đây như gắt hơn ...

sample_comments.title: Truly exceptional service that goes above and beyond for families.
sample_comments.text:
We have stayed at the Holiday Inn Resort Ho Tram more than 10 times, and every single visit has been wonderful. We've come as a couple, with friends, with our small family of four, and with our large extended family, and the experience is always consistently excellent.

While the facilities and services are top-notch, what truly makes this resort our favorite is the incredible staff. They are remarkably attentive, thoughtful, and have a genuine talent for anticipating guests' needs before you even have to ask.

I want to share a specific story from our last visit that perfectly illustrates this. I was at the breakfast restaurant with my two young children (ages 5 and 2) while my wife was getting her food. A staff member, despite being busy serving other tables, noticed me with the kids. She proactively engaged my 5-year-old in a friendly chat, recommended the jam sandwiches to him, and even helped me get one for him. She also helped me keep an eye on my toddler until my wife returned.

Later, when my 2-year-old became fussy and refused to eat, I was amazed by what happened next. Both a staff member and the restaurant manager came over to our table to help calm him down, gently engaging with him until he was happy again and finished his meal.

I never once asked for their help, yet they offered it with such genuine care and professionalism. It's this level of proactive, heartfelt service that turns a great holiday into an unforgettable one. This is why we keep coming back. Highly, highly recommended for any traveler, especially families.

sample_comments.title: Great Family Resort
sample_comments.text:
Holiday Inn Ho Tram offers an excellent getaway for families, especially those traveling with kids. The free shuttle service to Ho Chi Minh City is a standout feature, making it convenient for those without private transport. The resort provides plenty of activities for children, including multiple kids' pools, a clean beach, a kids' quarter (though payable), and an outdoor playground. These amenities ensure that kids are entertained throughout the stay.

On the flip side, the buffet breakfast could use some improvement. While I found the second day's selection more to my taste, consistency in quality and variety would enhance the dining experience.

Overall, the resort offers great value for money, considering the amenities and family-friendly features. It's a solid option for a relaxing family vacation, with just a few tweaks needed to elevate it further.

sample_comments.title: The management is good, and it is suitable for couples and families due to various facilities.
sample_comments.text:
Transportation from Ho Chi Minh was via a free shuttle bus, and the modern bus had ample spacing and was clean (it took 2.5 hours since we left at 10 AM on Friday). Check-in was quick, and the bellboy brought our luggage promptly.

The food court on the L floor was convenient for a simple meal, and the room service seemed to offer the same food. Lemongrass, the breakfast location, is on the G floor and is easily accessible as it connects to the pools. The pool appeared to be shared with other hotels, and it seemed to be shared with a nearby resort as well, but since it was a regular weekend, there weren't many people. The pool water was generally clean, and the tiles seemed to be frequently cleaned to avoid being slippery. There are about five different types of pools, and the deepest one is 1.5 meters, but it had a lot of leaves and dust (perhaps that's why no one was around). 

The beach right in front of the sea was well maintained with almost no trash, and lifeguards were always on duty. However, the makeshift shower to wash off sand when transitioning from the beach to the pool had low water pressure, making it quite difficult to rinse off, so improvements are needed.

For dinner, we ate at two places:
- THE GRAND BISTRO: I ordered the tenderloin steak cooked medium well, but it was not done as requested, making the Korean BBQ taste better. The KIDS menu overall was lacking and seemed insufficiently described. The bread served before the meal was a bit dry, indicating a need for improvement. The total bill for two adults and two kids, including wine, came to 3,800,000 VND, but satisfaction was on the lower side.
- KHOI: I ordered a ribeye for my kids who don't eat seafood, and it was tastier than the tenderloin from GRAND BISTRO (even though it was slightly cheaper). The seafood platter and baby squid we ordered were both highly satisfying. Including two bottles of soju, the total for two adults and two kids was 3,200,000 VND---higher satisfaction compared to GRAND BISTRO, but still considered overall expensive.

The room condition was okay, but ants were occasionally seen in the bathroom, and the water quality was not great as it had a slight yellowish tint in the bathtub. I would recommend sensitive skin individuals bring a filter. The bunk bed had a mattress that felt like foam without elasticity. The minibar was said to be free, but it only contained soda and capsule coffee, which I didn't even touch.

Breakfast had a variety of bread, and there was a corner for kids, which was nice, but for rice noodles, one day it was bun bo and the next day it was fish cake rice noodles, so there were no beef rice noodles, which was disappointing. I took the previously reserved free shuttle bus back, but it was a Sunday, and there was a lot of traffic... (It left at 1 PM and took 3.5 hours).

sample_comments.title: Review of Holiday Inn Resort Ho Tram
sample_comments.text:
I had a wonderful 3 days and 2 nights with my family.

The resort is very clean, child-friendly, has a play area for children, and the rooms have rounded furniture, safe for small babies without the risk of bumping into sharp edges.

The service is of high quality, with staff always ready to assist when needed, suitable for families wanting to vacation with babies under 1 year old.

Entertainment facilities such as restaurants, cafes, bars, and clubs are diverse, the swimming pool has clean water, and it is safe and convenient as towels are provided on-site without needing to bring them from the room.

I will definitely come back many more times with my family to experience the amenities that we haven't used yet.

sample_comments.negatives: Излишне хлорированная вода в бассейне и в номерах. Не стабильный WiFi в некоторых местах на территории, ближе к морю отваливается постоянно. sample_comments.text:
- Room is spacious, clean, bright, and tidy.
- Sea view and overlooking the pool, very airy and beautiful.
- The area has a lot of cool greenery.
- Buffet includes a full range of Asian, European, and American dishes; basic, not very diverse, but well-seasoned and tasty.
- Staff are super enthusiastic and very cute.
- Check-in, check-out, and baggage handling are very quick.
- There is both an outdoor and indoor playground right within the resort premises (100,000 VND/hour/child for the indoor area).
- Nearby, there is a Wonder museum suitable for young children.
- Many other activities such as live music, magic shows, workshops, etc.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Рады поделиться впечатлениями о нашем отдыхе здесь 5 чудеснейших дней!! Песочный пляж удобный заход в воду чистый ухоженный лежаки в тени деревьев; вид на океан из номера завораживает плюс палитра номера в цвет вида из окна; чай кофе вода ежедневно пополняемые; персонал дружелюбный открытый и при этом ненавязчивый; из-за специфики тонального произношения немного сложно понимать английский; на завтрак сыры мясо рыба (типа нашей масляной) тосты только что испеченый хлеб фрукты вкусный кофе из кофемашины. Несколько ресторанов, особо понравился buffet dinner в Lemongrass, настоящая итальянская пицца в Foodcourt и шоу фонтанов в Seagfood. Благодаря большой территории и внимательному заботливому персоналу не ощущается то что отель огромный (их тут даже два Intercontinental и Holiday Inn) Нам все очень понравилось благодарим и рекомендуем, вернемся снова при возможности. Очень чистый, красивый, комфортный отель. Большие, светлые, красивые номера, современная мебель и техника. Букинг повысил нам уровень номера, у нас была Кинг сайз кровать и вид на море и бассейны. Завтраки очень разнообразные, и вкусные, я была в восторге, к сожалению нельзя заказать или брать завтрак в номер, обязательно спускаться на завтрак в ресторан. Огромная территория, на ней три отеля и гостям можно посещать все бассейны и рестораны, детские игровые и фитнес зал. есть бассейн с детскими горками, вода везде теплая. Пляж чистый, есть шезлонги и качели, гамак. Есть боулинг , детские аппараты для игр, магазин с едой и всем необходимым, аптека. Кинотеатр Цены в кафе конечно завешены, но рядом с отелями есть прекрасные Вьет рестораны с морепродуктами. Ехать 5 мин на такси или байке.
Персонал отзывчивый, приветливый, стараются помочь, проводить. Просили в номер доп одеяло, лёд для напитков, и даже дали рис чтобы мы могли положить туда планшет который мы утопили в бассейне. Х

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
Every year, my family visits this resort 2-3 times because the service here is truly amazing. Everything you need is already inside the resort, so there's basically no need to go outside.

There are plenty of dining options, a game area for kids and adults, and now they even have pickleball courts, kayaking, and so many swimming pools to choose from. Perfect place for family vacations, relaxing weekends, and quality time together

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
I've stayed at Holiday Inn Resort Ho Tram Beach several times, and every return visit still brings back the same sense of satisfaction as the very first.

What I love most about this resort is its open, clean, and well-maintained environment. It's an ideal destination for both family vacations and relaxing weekend getaways. The swimming pool is spacious, the grounds are lush and green, and the private beach is especially calm and quiet --- perfect for escaping the busy city life.

However, what impresses me the most is the service style of the staff, particularly the Front Office (FO) team. They are consistently professional, friendly, and incredibly attentive. From check-in to check-out, everything is handled smoothly, efficiently, and always accompanied by warm, genuine smiles. Even small requests are addressed quickly and flexibly, making guests feel truly cared for rather than just being served in a routine way.

To me, a beautiful resort alone is not enough --- it's the quality of service that keeps guests coming back. And Holiday Inn Ho Tram truly excels in this aspect. I will definitely return again on future occasions.

sample_comments.title: Was ok but be careful when speaking to the reservation team!
sample_comments.positives: The property offers fantastic pools and a variety of activities that are perfect for kids. The on-site staff were professional and welcoming, with the check-in team providing an efficient and friendly experience.
sample_comments.negatives: Our experience with the reservation team, particularly Ms. Phuong Luu, was extremely disappointing. The process of booking a shuttle was unnecessarily complicated, and we were pressured to pay extra for a room upgrade. Despite booking a room for 2 adults and 2 child's, only three seats were reserved on the shuttle, forcing our youngest child to sit on her mother's lap for a three-hour journey. It was clear the facilities and restaurants were underused, as we were often the only patrons. Businesses should appreciate and assist loyal customers who choose to spend their time and money with them. This experience fell far below expectations. Had a much better and personalised experience at Angeanna to be honest!

It's an ideal destination for anyone who wants to rest, recharge, and enjoy a quiet vacation away from the busy city. Highly recommended for a relaxing getaway.

Plenty of activities indoors and outdoors to keep you busy. Beds are out of this world comfortable and they even have a free daily shuttle to/from Saigon. Absolutely recommend for couples, solo travelers and families.

sample_comments.title: 3-day vacation at Holiday Inn resort
sample_comments.text:
From the moment I arrived, I was impressed. The resort is very clean and impeccably maintained, which made for a comfortable and relaxing environment.

A huge highlight was the staff---all of the employees were incredibly friendly and attentive. Their genuine warmth and helpfulness truly made a difference in my experience.

I highly recommend this resort for anyone looking for a wonderful and memorable getaway!

sample_comments.title: Great short getaway for 1-2 nights.
sample_comments.positives: It was my 4th time staying at The Grand Ho Tram. Stay at this resort partly for golf at The Bluffs. V challenging link course! Stayed at Holiday Inn n Ixora n both hotels r well maintained n clean. The breakfast at Holiday Inn has a wide selection of food.
sample_comments.negatives: The F & B outlets at the hotel and golf club are a bit overpriced! So guests prefer to have their meals outside like the nearby seafood restaurants. Not many nearby restaurants near the resort unlike in HCMC n have to pay more for taking taxi out for food.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Super stunning hotel! The staff are amazing. One of our members forgot her bag and they kept it safely and returned it to us --- we really appreciate their honesty. The place is great for relaxing, with a nice heated pool and very close to the beach. The food is also great. We were very happy during our stay while celebrating the birthdays of my two sisters on December 1. Thank you so much --- I'm really glad I found this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: A large pool and very nice staff
sample_comments.negatives:
You should not expect a cozy place here. Everything is too big and too far away from each other. The elevator is extremely far from the check in area, forcing you to walk through stores etc. The food at the Fuel bar and the Lemongrass restaurant is just at the average compared to other five star resorts. 
The hotel brochure in our room introduces 19 restaurants and bars across all 3 facilities of the complex. We checked out what they offered in Holiday Inn and Intercontinental (belonging to the same Grand Hotram and share the same check in area, which we didn't know before arriving and hence were quite confused). Most of the places at Intercontinental were closed, perhaps due to low occupancy. 
Also pay attention at check-out. The staff recommended me to accept the deduction of our food bills from our deposit (which was required via credit card upon check-in) instead of cancelling the deposit and making a new payment for the bills. The first option means you would have to wait for 30 days until the remaining of the deposit is transferred back to your account. The latter is clearly better for guests as there is no wait time for you to get your money back.
Another reminder is that the check in time is 4pm. The staff was nice enough to let us check in at around 3.30pm though.
In short, while the place gives you a luxurious vibe, the fact that it is too big and accommodates a huge number of guests doesn't give you a warm relaxing experience. While it is not my style and I won't return but it's just me, I fully understand why this place suits a certain type of guests.

sample_comments.title: The hospitality is wonderful!
sample_comments.text:
The facility is clean, the pool and the sea are enjoyable, there is a free shuttle bus from Ho Chi Minh City, and the cost performance is very good! Moreover, the hospitality is excellent!

All the hotel staff are very kind. My child got injured while playing on the playground, but fortunately, a nurse noticed and immediately arranged for first aid.

The next day, another staff member in the lobby asked if my child was okay, showing genuine concern, and I was impressed that the information was properly shared within the hotel.

This is the first time I have received such attentive service outside of Japan, and I truly recommend it!

I will definitely use it again.

sample_comments.title: A relaxing holiday with a safe space for the kids to have a little more freedom
sample_comments.positives: We all loved the great breakfast spread! The restaurant staff and those working around the grounds were always very friendly and helpful. There was a good range of facilities to enjoy for the duration of our stay and everywhere was kept in very good shape. The free shuttle bus service to HCMC was very convenient. The beach is kept clean and tidy, going for early morning walks along the long stretch of sand was amazing.
sample_comments.negatives: I found it very strange that at check in we were told that complimentary water is only offered on the day of arrival. I have never experienced that from other hotels before. Normally the water in the room is replenished daily. The lady then continued by following us down the corridor to pass on one last comment which was that no outside food is allowed in the hotel. It did feel rather strange to be approached in that manner. Some items/drinks seems particularly over priced. For example the fact that a virgin mocktail would cost the same as a cocktail baffled me. The numerous pools were enjoyed by the kids but the 'cement' slide was the biggest hit. Unfortunately, every single one of them ruined their swim suits on it. The surface is too rough!

sample_comments.title: The new hotel is clean, stylish, and great!!
sample_comments.text: The new hotel is clean, stylish, and good. I stayed at Holiday Inn for 2 nights and Intercontinental for 3 nights, and the breakfast was delicious (we ate in the same restaurant all 5 days). The surrounding environment is also nice, and the staff are friendly, which is great. The Intercontinental had a bathtub in the bathroom, but this one only has a shower without a bathtub. The casino is in the same building, so it was nice to hang out for a bit in the evening. My friends were all very satisfied!!

sample_comments.title: Nice stay but a bit too expensive.
sample_comments.positives: The hotel was nice with a very good pool area and attractive access to the beach. Outside playground was very nice as well. Children sleeping room was great. Kids love something like this. Staff was very friendly and helpful.
sample_comments.negatives: Aircon was not that good. It is blowing too strong. At night hard to suffer. The whole hotel was a bit too cold. Inside playground was not free of charge - a bit pity. Since there is nothing around to go out, inside restaurants are really expensive. 2 pho bo, 1 springroll and 3 drinks over 1 Million. This is not acceptable.

sample_comments.positives: The breakfast was great, good options. The coffee wasn't great which was the only disappointment. Great facilities and very friendly staff. Lovely room and views.
sample_comments.negatives: We stayed three days and by day three the food was starting to taste the same. A minor suggestion but one more different food option would be great. The staff were great, at times I would say slightly too eager to please.

sample_comments.title: Super family friendly - obsessed!
sample_comments.text:
Service here was amazing! All staff were so helpful and so good with the kids. All restaurants were very considerate of my daughter's allergies. We are very thankful for that. Only had one experience at the Grand Cafe where I heard the staff member complain about asking the chef about the allergies. I can understand Vietnamese so I understood. Then I found cheese on the pasta which I clearly asked for no cheese and my daughter will have an allergic reaction. This was disappointing as everyone has been saying extra amazing!

It was my birthday on this trip and the hotel staff spoilt me with a birthday cake on arrival. 

Facilities were really good and didn't need to leave the hotel for the 3 days we spent there. Our kids just enjoyed being in the pool and kids centre. 

Massage was good. The therapist was really experienced and made some really good suggestions. 

Loved our room. We had the king bed with the bunk beds. Our kids (3 and 5) loved it they slept so well.

sample_comments.title: Great place to stay
sample_comments.text: One of the best hotels i have ever stayed in, staff are amazing, helpful and friendly. The hotel has everything you need. Great pools,very very clean. The staff go out of their way to make sure your stay is memorable. The seafood restaurants in ho tram are the best and so cheap. I will be back again. Great for families
sample_comments.room_type: 2 Bedroom Suite Marine Theme Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Great resort for families!
sample_comments.positives: The hotel complex is great, they have a few different restaurants, a games room (paid), casino, children's room (paid), even a small pharmacy and convenience store. The swimming pools and mini children's waterpark was the highlight. The breakfast was fantastic and the dinner at the Lemongrass restaurant was superb. I would like return there in the future for a longer stay.
sample_comments.negatives: The hotel is around 2.5h from Ho Chi Minh city and airport. The hotel provides a shuttle bus, but the trip is a little tiring, specially with small children.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful location for family
sample_comments.text: The facilities are very good and staff is super friendly and helpful. Highly recommend for family trip!

sample_comments.title: Amazing hotel
sample_comments.positives:
The hotel is amazing.
Breakfast buffet had so much to choose from and everything was so tasty.
The rooms were so comfortable and clean.
The pools are fabulous.
Staff are so friendly and helpful.
sample_comments.negatives:
There is not a lot of choice for restaurants for dinner, the lemongrass restaurant is very nice but would have loved some different options as well.
The resort also has other resorts nearby but the nearest decent town -Ho Tram is 45km away and took about an hour and a half to get to.
That said it was so nice we didn't want to leave the resort much anyway!

secondary.description_full:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm - Nơi nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng tại Vũng Tàu

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm là một khách sạn 5.0 sao nằm tại Vũng Tàu, Việt Nam. Với khoảng cách chỉ 50 km từ trung tâm thành phố, đây là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trốn khỏi cuộc sống đô thị ồn ào và tận hưởng không gian yên bình bên bờ biển.

Khách sạn có giờ nhận phòng từ 04:00 PM và giờ trả phòng đến 12:00 PM, giúp bạn có thời gian thoải mái để tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình. Với tổng cộng 502 phòng, Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm có đủ không gian để đón tiếp khách du lịch từ khắp nơi trên thế giới. Khách sạn được xây dựng vào năm 2021, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm hiện đại và sang trọng.

Đặc biệt, chính sách của khách sạn cho phép trẻ em từ 4 đến 11 tuổi nghỉ miễn phí. Điều này tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ cùng nhau mà không lo về chi phí. Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho mọi du khách muốn tìm kiếm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Vũng Tàu.

Trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm không chỉ mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời mà còn cung cấp đầy đủ các tiện nghi giải trí. Với đa dạng các cửa hàng, du khách có thể thoả sức mua sắm và tìm kiếm những món quà độc đáo tại cửa hàng quà/souvenir. Nếu bạn muốn thử vận may, hãy ghé qua sòng bạc và tham gia các trò chơi đa dạng. Quầy bar và quầy rượu sẽ đáp ứng nhu cầu thưởng thức đồ uống của du khách. Đêm đến, du khách có thể tham gia vào không gian vui chơi sôi động tại quán bar hoặc hòa mình vào không khí sôi động của quán nhạc. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và làm đẹp, khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có salon, dịch vụ massage, sauna và spa để du khách tận hưởng những liệu pháp chăm sóc cơ thể tuyệt vời. Ngoài ra, khu vườn rộng lớn và phòng trò chơi sẽ là nơi lý tưởng để du khách thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát. Đừng quên thử sức với karaoke tại khu nghỉ dưỡng để tạo ra những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ. Hãy ghé qua cửa hàng quà/souvenir để tìm những món đồ lưu niệm độc đáo và làm quà cho người thân và bạn bè.

Các tiện nghi thể thao tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn bãi biển Hồ Tràm ở Vũng Tàu, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách một loạt các tiện nghi thể thao để tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ. Khách sạn có hồ bơi trong nhà và hồ bơi ngoài trời, nơi du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh tươi mát. Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có sân golf trên địa điểm, nơi du khách có thể thực hiện những cú đánh xuất sắc và thể hiện kỹ năng golf của mình.

Nếu bạn muốn duy trì thể lực và sức khỏe trong kỳ nghỉ của mình, khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có trung tâm thể dục miễn phí. policyNotes:
1/ Phương tiện di chuyển
- Cơ sở lưu trú cung cấp dịch vụ xe buýt đưa đón từ TP. Hồ Chí Minh đến Hồ Tràm và ngược lại. Bắt đầu từ chiều ngày 17 tháng 04, điểm đón xe của chúng tôi được chuyển đến tòa nhà VinaTex, 14 Võ Văn Kiệt, Phường Sài Gòn, TP. Hồ Chí Minh (góc Nam Kỳ Khởi Nghĩa và Võ Văn Kiệt). Số lượng ghế trên xe có hạn và được sắp xếp theo nguyên tắc ai đến trước được phục vụ trước. Quý khách vui lòng đặt chỗ trước và phụ thuộc vào tình trạng thực tế. Để xử lý việc đặt xe, vui lòng liên hệ với chúng tôi để kiểm tra lịch xe còn trống, địa điểm đón và đặt chỗ ngồi.
2/ Quy định chung
- Tất cả khách lưu trú vui lòng xuất trình bản gốc và còn hiệu lực của hộ chiếu, thị thực/Thẻ cư trú, hoặc CCCD/CMND Việt Nam khi nhận phòng.
- Giờ nhận phòng của khu nghỉ dưỡng là 16:00, và giờ trả phòng là 12:00. Yêu cầu nhận phòng sớm hoặc trả phòng muộn phụ thuộc vào tình trạng thực tế và có thể phát sinh phụ phí.
- Không cho phép mang theo thú cưng trong khuôn viên khu nghỉ dưỡng. Không được mang đồ ăn và thức uống từ bên ngoài vào khu nghỉ dưỡng.
- Khách bổ sung sẽ áp dụng phụ phí theo chính sách của khu nghỉ dưỡng.

3/ Vào The Grand Club và Khu vực Chơi game VIP
- Theo quy định của pháp luật Việt Nam, việc vào The Grand Club và Khu vực Chơi game VIP bị giới hạn đối với các khách đủ điều kiện như sau:
* Khách Việt Nam
- Phải đủ 21 tuổi trở lên và có đầy đủ năng lực hành vi dân sự. Áp dụng phí vào cửa: 1.000.000 VND/người/24 giờ liên tục, hoặc 25.000.000 VND/người/tháng.
- Cung cấp bằng chứng về thu nhập thường xuyên hằng tháng tối thiểu 10 triệu VND theo quy định của pháp luật Việt Nam. Các giấy tờ được chấp nhận bao gồm phiếu lương gần nhất hoặc xác nhận thu nhập (cấp trong vòng 03 tháng gần nhất), hợp đồng lao động hoặc hợp đồng cho thuê còn hiệu lực, hoặc giấy chứng nhận tiết kiệm/tiền gửi có kỳ hạn tối thiểu 01 năm. Có thể nộp nhiều loại giấy tờ.
- Thực hiện tất cả giao dịch chơi game bằng đồng Việt Nam (VND), và mọi giá trị còn lại sẽ được quy đổi lại sang VND khi rời khỏi khu vực.

* Khách mang hộ chiếu nước ngoài
- Phải đủ 18 tuổi trở lên.
- Chỉ chấp nhận hộ chiếu và thị thực bản gốc, còn hiệu lực làm bằng chứng đủ điều kiện và phải xuất trình để kiểm tra trước khi vào.
4/ Phụ phí
- Xin lưu ý phụ phí cho trẻ em có thể được thu khi nhận phòng, tùy thuộc vào phương thức thanh toán mà khách đã chọn trên trang web đặt phòng. Phụ phí như sau:
* Trẻ em 0-3 tuổi: miễn phí nếu sử dụng giường có sẵn.
* Trẻ em 4-11 tuổi: thu $8++/khách/ngày cho bữa sáng nếu sử dụng giường có sẵn.
* Trẻ em từ 12 tuổi trở lên: thu $45++/khách/ngày cho lưu trú và bữa sáng.
- Giường phụ theo yêu cầu: thu $30++/giường/ngày. (Không thể kê giường phụ trong Phòng Twin)
* Các mức giá trên KHÔNG bao gồm phí dịch vụ và VAT.

embedding_text:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Holiday Inn Hồ Tràm Beach By IHG (Holiday Inn Resort Ho Tram Beach By IHG) - khách sạn 5.0 sao tại Vũng Tàu.
Địa chỉ: The Grand Ho Tram, Ho Tram Hamlet, Ho Tram Commune, Ho Chi Minh City, Viet Nam, Bãi biển Hồ Tràm, Vũng Tàu, Việt Nam.
Ngoài tiêu chuẩn IHG Clean Promise, tất cả khách đều được truy cập Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng và đỗ xe miễn phí nếu đến bằng ô tô. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Bãi biển Hồ Tràm của Vũng Tàu, chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Được xếp hạng 5 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng mát-xa, bể bơi ngoài trời và phòng tập ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Bi-a, Bàn làm việc, Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi biển riêng, Bãi chơi bowling, Bãi đỗ xe [miễn phí], Bình chữa cháy, Băng niêm phong phòng dành cho khách sau khi vệ sinh, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bể bơi, Bể bơi [trẻ em], Bể bơi có tầm nhìn, Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bộ dao nĩa cho trẻ, Bộ kim chỉ, Bữa sáng, Bữa sáng [tự chọn], Bữa sáng gọi món, Bữa sáng kiểu Tây, Bữa sáng kiểu Á, Bữa ăn cho trẻ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, CLB trẻ em, Các loại khăn, Các môn thể thao dưới nước (không có động cơ), Cách bày bàn ăn an toàn, Cách âm, Câu lạc bộ đêm, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Cơ sở vật chất cho họp mặt/tiệc lớn.
Điểm đánh giá 9.1/10 dựa trên 3918 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Dịch vụ, Bể bơi, Độ sạch sẽ, Bữa sáng, Địa điểm, Gia đình, Nhiều lựa chọn nhà hàng, Bãi biển.
Các loại phòng: 1 King 1 Bunk Family Suite Forest View; 2 Bedroom Suite Ocean View Nonsmoking; 1 King Standard Cabana Ocean View Smoking; 1 King Standard Cabana Forest View Smoking; Phòng Tiêu Chuẩn 2 Giường Đơn Có Ban Công Nhìn Ra Biển - Hút Thuốc (Standard Twin Room with Balcony and Ocean View - Smoking); Suite 2 Phòng Ngủ Hướng Biển - Hút Thuốc (2 Bedroom Suite Sea View Smoking); 2 Bedroom Suite Marine Theme Forest View; 1 King Standard Ocean View.
Gần: Sân golf The Bluffs Ho Tram Strip, Hồ Cốc, Khu cắm trại Hương Phong, Khu du lịch Gió Biển, Núi Đá Dắt, Núi Kho.
